items.title: PM Modi’s call to stop foreign travel comes as spending in this area has already been falling
items.summary: RBI data shows that the real growth areas in terms of foreign spending are purchases of immovable assets abroad and investments in foreign debt and equity

items.title: EU diplomats agree to sanction Hamas leaders and Israeli settlers
items.summary: The unanimous decision by the European Union, agreed to on Monday, was sparked by growing outrage over the devastation in Gaza during the Israel-Hamas war.
